fetched_reason: Baseline snapshot taken after validating EC iNat path coverage against iNat's published spec. Used to verify parameter types, required flags, and detect ghost params on identifications endpoints.
findings: All 17 EC-covered paths confirmed present in iNat spec. Fixed: taxon_id required=true on histogram and popular_field_values (iNat has optional). Removed ghost geo/seasonal params from /identifications and /identifications/species_counts (copied from observations, not supported on ident endpoints). Type mismatches where iNat uses array for repeatable params left as deliberate scalar narrowing.
